Title: 2026 Summerfest Lineup | Summerfest, The World's Largest Music Festival

URL Source: https://www.summerfest.com/lineup/

Markdown Content:
# 2026 Summerfest Lineup | Summerfest, The World's Largest Music Festival

[![Image 2: 2026 Summerfest Logo](https://s3.summerfest.com/assets/images/sf-logo/sf25-website-logolockup-731.64x164.38-071525.svg)](https://www.summerfest.com/bannerclick/166)Toggle navigation

*   [Tickets & Promotions](https://www.summerfest.com/tickets/)
*   [Lineup](https://www.summerfest.com/lineup-wrapper/)
*   [Stages](https://www.summerfest.com/stages/)
*   [Experience](https://www.summerfest.com/event-info/)
*   [Merch](https://www.summerfest.com/merch/)
*   [Community](https://www.summerfest.com/community/)
*   [Info](https://www.summerfest.com/about/)
*   [Upcoming Shows](https://www.summerfest.com/summerfest-presents-upcoming-shows/)

![Image 3: Miller Lite Official Beer of Summerfest](https://www.summerfest.com/assets/components/sftheme/web/images/logos/miller-lite.svg)

Be the first to know about updates

### Be the first to know about the Lineup, Ticket Promos, and Festival Updates

# 2026 Lineup

No results found

![Image 8: American Family Insurance Amphitheater logo](https://s3.summerfest.com/assets/images/stages/2024/amphitheater/AmfamAmp-logo.jpg)

## American Family Insurance Amphitheater Headliners

A separate ticket is needed to see concerts in the American Family Insurance Amphitheater, but your Amphitheater ticket also includes admission to Summerfest on the day of your show

_All performers and showtimes are subject to change._

![Image 9](https://www.summerfest.com/)

×

@

[![Image 10](https://www.summerfest.com/)(opens in a new window)](https://www.summerfest.com/)

[Tickets (opens ticket link in a new window)](https://www.summerfest.com/)

# FESTIVAL STAGE HEADLINERS

Discover great performances and make amazing memories with multiple festival stages of live music, experiences, and more._All performers and showtimes are subject to change_

[Tickets (opens ticket link in a new window)](https://www.summerfest.com/)

![Image 121: FieldHockey](https://www.summerfest.com/assets/CenterStage/PerformerImages/Performance_FieldHockey_fieldhockey-500x400_202602200147312576.jpg)
